description.en: Request deletion of your StartMessaging account and all associated data. Process completes within 30 days.

title.pt: Exclusão de Conta e Diretrizes de Limpeza de Dados
title.es: Eliminación de Cuenta y Pautas de Purga de Datos
title.tr: Hesap Silme ve Veri Temizleme Yönergeleri

subtitle.en: Step-by-step instructions on how to permanently close your account, request unused wallet refunds, initiate data purge cycles, and understand legal data retention requirements. Last updated: June 1, 2026.
subtitle.pt: Instruções passo a passo sobre como fechar permanentemente sua conta, solicitar reembolsos de saldo de carteira, iniciar ciclos de eliminação de dados e compreender os requisitos legais de retenção de dados. Última atualização: 1 de junho de 2026.
subtitle.es: Instrucciones paso a paso sobre cómo cerrar permanentemente su cuenta, solicitar reembolsos de saldo de billetera, iniciar ciclos de eliminación de datos y comprender los requisitos legales de retención de datos. Última actualización: 1 de junio de 2026.
subtitle.id: Petunjuk langkah demi langkah tentang cara menutup akun Anda secara permanen, meminta pengembalian saldo dompet, memulai siklus pembersihan data, dan memahami persyaratan retensi data yang sah. Terakhir diperbarui: 1 Juni 2026.
subtitle.ar: تعليمات خطوة بخطوة حول كيفية إغلاق حسابك بشكل دائم، وطلب استرداد رصيد المحفظة، وبدء دورات تطهير البيانات، وفهم المتطلبات القانونية للاحتفاظ بالبيانات. آخر تحديث: 1 يونيو 2026.
subtitle.tr: Hesabınızı kalıcı olarak nasıl kapatacağınız, kullanılmayan cüzdan bakiyesinin iadesini nasıl talep edeceğiniz, veri silme döngülerini nasıl başlatacağınız ve yasal veri saklama gereksinimlerimizi anlama yönergesi. Son güncelleme: 1 Haziran 2026.

content.en:
How to Delete Your Account

You can request the deletion of your StartMessaging account and all associated data at any time. There are two ways to initiate account deletion:

Option 1: Through Your Dashboard

  1. Log in to your StartMessaging dashboard at app.startmessaging.com
  2. Go to Settings → Account → Delete Account
  3. Confirm your request by entering your password
  4. Your account will be deactivated immediately and permanently deleted within 30 days.

Option 2: Via Email

  1. Send an email to startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com from the email address associated with your account
  2. Subject line: "Account Deletion Request"
  3. Include your registered email address and company name
  4. We will process your request within 30 days.

What Gets Deleted

When your account is deleted, the following data is permanently removed:

  • Your account profile and credentials
  • All API keys and webhook configurations
  • Message templates and chatbot flows
  • Contact lists and audience segments
  • Campaign history and analytics data
  • Message logs and delivery reports

What We Retain

Per legal requirements, we retain the following for the specified periods:

  • Billing and tax records: 7 years (required by global tax regulations).
  • Aggregate anonymized analytics: Indefinitely (cannot be traced back to you).
  • Legal compliance records: As required by applicable law.

Important Notes

  • Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone.
  • Active subscriptions will be canceled immediately with no refund for the current billing period.
  • If you have an Enterprise plan, please contact your account manager before requesting deletion.

Contact

For questions about account deletion: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Phone: +91 6376383348
content.in:
How to Delete Your Account

You can request the deletion of your StartMessaging account and all associated data at any time. There are two ways to initiate account deletion:

Option 1: Through Your Dashboard

  1. Log in to your StartMessaging dashboard at app.startmessaging.com
  2. Go to Settings → Account → Delete Account
  3. Confirm your request by entering your password
  4. Your account will be deactivated immediately and permanently deleted within 30 days.

Option 2: Via Email

  1. Send an email to startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com from the email address associated with your account
  2. Subject line: "Account Deletion Request"
  3. Include your registered email address and company name
  4. State whether you would like any remaining wallet balance refunded before deletion.
  5. We will process your request within 30 days.

What Gets Deleted

When your account is deleted, the following data is permanently removed:

  • Your account profile and credentials
  • All API keys and webhook configurations
  • Message templates and chatbot flows
  • Contact lists and audience segments
  • Campaign history and analytics data
  • Message logs and delivery reports

What We Retain

Per legal requirements, we retain the following for the specified periods:

  • Billing and tax records: 5 years (required under Indian Income Tax Act and GST regulations).
  • Aggregate anonymized analytics: Indefinitely (cannot be traced back to you).
  • Telecom logs: Message routing records as required by TRAI compliance.

Important Notes

  • Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone.
  • Any remaining account balance or wallet credits will be forfeited unless a refund is requested before deletion is completed.

Contact

For questions about account deletion: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Phone: +91 6376383348 | WhatsApp: +91 6376383348
